zh.France or Luxembourg: 法國i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲盧布格
zh.lifeSummary: 當Gisèle於大約0985年出生在法國洛萊莫瑟勒梅斯時，她的父親Gerhard de Metz16歲，母親Éve de Luxembourg30歲。她於大約1008年與Gérard IV de Metz de Bouzonville結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1045年在法國莫瑟勒布左維爾享年61歲，埋葬在法國莫瑟勒布左維爾。

zh-hans.Longwy, Meurthe Et Moselle, Lorraine, Fr: 法国洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒隆
zh-hans.France or Luxembourg: 法国i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲盧布格
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gisèle于大约0985年出生在法国洛萊莫瑟勒梅斯时，她的父亲Gerhard de Metz16岁，母亲Éve de Luxembourg30岁。她于大约1008年与Gérard IV de Metz de Bouzonville结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1045年在法国莫瑟勒布左維爾享年61岁，埋葬在法国莫瑟勒布左維爾。

nameMeanings.name: Gisèle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: name of Frankish origin, from the Germanic word gisil ‘pledge’. It was a common practice in medieval Europe to leave children as pledges for an alliance, to be brought up at a foreign court, and the name may be derived as a byname from this practice. This was the name by which the wife of Duke Rollo of Normandy ( c.860– c.930 ) was known. On her account the name enjoyed considerable popularity in France from an early period. Use of the name in English-speaking countries is much more recent, and is due mainly to the ballet Giselle (first performed in 1841 ).

variants.name: Gisella
meanings: name of Frankish origin, from the Germanic word gisil ‘pledge’. It was a common practice in medieval Europe to leave children as pledges for an alliance, to be brought up at a foreign court, and the name may be derived as a byname from this practice. This was the name by which the wife of Duke Rollo of Normandy ( c.860– c.930 ) was known. On her account the name enjoyed considerable popularity in France from an early period. Use of the name in English-speaking countries is much more recent, and is due mainly to the ballet Giselle (first performed in 1841 ).

meanings: name of Frankish origin, from the Germanic word gisil ‘pledge’. It was a common practice in medieval Europe to leave children as pledges for an alliance, to be brought up at a foreign court, and the name may be derived as a byname from this practice. This was the name by which the wife of Duke Rollo of Normandy ( c.860– c.930 ) was known. On her account the name enjoyed considerable popularity in France from an early period. Use of the name in English-speaking countries is much more recent, and is due mainly to the ballet Giselle (first performed in 1841 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Gisèle was born about 0985, in Metz, Moselle, Lorraine, France, her father, Gerhard de Metz, was 16 and her mother, Éve de Luxembourg, was 30. She married Gérard IV de Metz de Bouzonville about 1008. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1045, in Bouzonville, Moselle, France, at the age of 61, and was buried in Bouzonville, Moselle, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gisèle est née environ 0985, à Metz, Moselle, Lorraine, France, son père, Gerhard de Metz, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Éve de Luxembourg, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Gérard IV de Metz de Bouzonville environ 1008. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1045, à Bouzonville, Moselle, France, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterrée à Bouzonville, Moselle, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gisèle um 0985 in Metz, Mosel, Lothringen, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gerhard de Metz 16 und ihre Mutter Éve de Luxembourg 30. Sie hat um 1008 Gérard IV de Metz de Bouzonville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1045 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Busendorf, Moselle, Frankreich und wurde in Busendorf, Moselle, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gisèle è nata il circa 0985 nel Metz, Moselle, Lorraine, Francia, sua padre, Gerhard de Metz, aveva 16 anni e sua madre, Éve de Luxembourg, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Gérard IV de Metz de Bouzonville circa 1008. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1045, nel Bouzonville, Moselle, Francia, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolta a Bouzonville, Moselle, Francia.

ja.Bouzonville, Moselle, France: フランスモセルボウゾンヴィル
ja.Longwy, Meurthe Et Moselle, Lorraine, Fr: フランスロレィヌメウルスエ-エト-モセルロングウイ
ja.France or Luxembourg: フランスiレ-デ-フランスパーイスルクセンボウルグ
ja.Metz, Moselle, Lorraine, France: フランスロレィヌモセルメッツ
ja.Bouzonville, Moselle, Lorraine, France: フランスモセルボウゾンヴィル
ja.lifeSummary: Gisèleが約0985年にフランスロレィヌモセルメッツで生まれた時，父Gerhard de Metzは16歳，母Éve de Luxembourgは30歳であった。約1008年にGérard IV de Metz de Bouzonvilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1045年にフランスモセルボウゾンヴィルで61歳で死去し，フランスモセルボウゾンヴィルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gisèle(이)가 대략 0985년 프랑스 로레이인 모셀 멧즈에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gerhard de Metz(은)는 16세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Éve de Luxembourg(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 대략 1008년 Gérard IV de Metz de Bouzonville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1045년 프랑스 모셀 부존빌에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 모셀 부존빌에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gisèle nasceu aproximadamente 0985, em Metz, Moselle, Lorraine, França, seu pai, Gerhard de Metz, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Éve de Luxembourg, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Gérard IV de Metz de Bouzonville aproximadamente 1008. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1045, em Bouzonville, Moselle, França, com 61 anos, e foi sepultada em Bouzonville, Moselle, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gisèle родилась около 0985 г. в местности мец, моселл, лорреаин, Франция, её отцу по имени Gerhard de Metz было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Éve de Luxembourg, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gérard IV de Metz de Bouzonville около 1008 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1045 г. в местности боузонвилл, моселл, Франция в возрасте 61 год и была похоронена в местности боузонвилл, моселл, Франция.

sm.From 981 to 990: mai le 0981 e o'o I le 0990

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gisèle nació aproximadamente 0985, en Metz, Moselle, Lorraine, Francia, su papá, Gerhard de Metz, tenía 16 años y su mamá, Éve de Luxembourg, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Gérard IV de Metz de Bouzonville aproximadamente 1008. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1045, en Bouzonville, Moselle, Francia, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultada en Bouzonville, Moselle, Francia.
